text:
I'll search for this paper to verify the citation details.
Based on my search results, I have found the paper with the exact title. The Science article page shows the complete author list. Let me verify the author details more precisely by examining the evidence.

From the Science journal page (result 1, sentence 1-21), the citation reads: "F. Noé, S. Olsson, J. Köhler, H. Wu, Boltzmann generators – Sampling equilibrium states of many-body systems with deep learning, Zenodo (2019)"

This confirms all four authors appear in the actual paper:
- Frank Noé (abbreviated as F. Noé)
- Simon Olsson (abbreviated as S. Olsson)
- Jonas Köhler (abbreviated as J. Köhler)
- Hao Wu

The automated checker's "correct" author list ("F. Noé, Jonas Köhler, Hao Wu") is incomplete — it is missing Simon Olsson, who is clearly listed as the second author in the Science publication. The cited reference includes all four correct authors.

The exact title matches, the year is 2019, and the venue is Science, all as cited. The paper was published in Science 365:eaaw1147 (2019), as confirmed in result 10, sentence 10-17.

EXPLANATION: The exact paper was found in Science journal with all four cited authors present (Frank Noé, Simon Olsson, Jonas Köhler, Hao Wu). The automated checker's "correct" author list was incomplete and missing Simon Olsson.
LINK: https://www.science.org/doi/10.1126/science.aaw1147
FOUND_TITLE: Boltzmann generators: Sampling equilibrium states of many-body systems with deep learning
FOUND_AUTHORS: Frank Noé, Simon Olsson, Jonas Köhler, Hao Wu
FOUND_YEAR: 2019
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
